description_en: Toulouse may not be a Muslim-majority destination, but it welcomes Muslim travelers with real halal options. You'll find 139 halal restaurants and 19 mosques nearby, plus real-time prayer times and the Qibla direction — everything to explore Toulouse, France, with peace of mind.
metaDescription_en: Halal guide to Toulouse: 139+ halal restaurants, 19 mosques, prayer times and tips for Muslim travelers. Halal Trust Score 3.9/5.
